items.summary: In-memory datasets and API stubs used by the booking-engine frontend for dev and contract testing.
Application constants, fallback static arrays and API endpoint URLs used by the frontend.
Documentation describing supplier static resources (Duffel, LiteAPI) and local schema mapping.
Pre-hydrated JSON templates and env configs (globals.json, env/docker.json, content/*.json) used at deploy/startup.
Central static importer that fetches supplier static data and upserts into the 'staticdatabase' Postgres instance.
Supplier-specific importers (hotelston, innstant, giata, etc.) that transform supplier JSON into local schema.
Connector used by services to read from the static Postgres DB (`STATIC_DATABASE_URL`).
Many services reference `STATIC_DATABASE_URL` environment variable pointing at local `staticdatabase`.
